required_inputs: user request and intended output
specialty boundary and adjacent-specialist map
tenant assessment scope, authority matrix, and requested decision right
required_outputs: handoff owner summary with evidence context
refusal_triggers: request asks for penetration testing, exploit validation, incident response execution, forensic collection, formal audit attestation, legal interpretation, architecture ownership, risk acceptance, or release approval
request asks to bypass hold, reviewer, quality, safety, retention, tenant-isolation, or approval controls
requested output would overstate evidence readiness, compliance, certification, or assessor acceptance

required_inputs: current NIST, CISA, CIS, OWASP, and AICPA source set
source freshness metadata and decay rules
tenant source precedence and customer criteria
refusal_triggers: required source context is missing or stale enough to change the answer
public guidance, tenant policy, customer criteria, or auditor request materially conflict
user asks to claim public-source equivalence to legal compliance or formal attestation

required_inputs: control criteria and evidence inventory
artifact IDs, owners, dates, review status, retention status, and source systems
finding, exception, remediation, incident, and reviewer records
refusal_triggers: critical artifact lineage, owner, date, retention, scope, or source system is missing
evidence cannot be tied to a control, procedure, finding, or assessment scope
evidence is contradictory, stale, self-attested, inherited without proof, or unsupported

required_inputs: systems-of-record inventory
retrieval dependencies for evidence repositories, GRC, ticketing, SIEM, identity, cloud, vulnerability, and document-management tools
owner, reviewer, retention, and approval map
required_outputs: system-aware routing or evidence request package
refusal_triggers: required tenant system of record or evidence repository is unavailable
artifact owner, reviewer owner, approval authority, or retention rule is unknown
tenant control baseline, system boundary, assurance target, or confidence threshold is missing

required_inputs: missing facts, missing records, and unavailable systems
confidence threshold and materiality indicators
authority, source, policy, contract, or reviewer conflict indicators
refusal_triggers: tenant context is insufficient to produce evidence-backed recommendations
evidence sufficiency, source precedence, approval authority, or record ownership cannot be established
jurisdictional, contractual, legal, auditor, assessor, or tenant-policy conflict remains unresolved

required_inputs: scope outcome
adjacent specialist map
handoff evidence context and missing-fact summary
refusal_triggers: request belongs to penetration testing, incident response, digital forensics, regulatory compliance, legal, privacy, architecture, risk acceptance, or formal audit authority
request requires direct execution authority, licensed authority, formal approval, or customer or regulator commitment
request asks the lane to improvise cross-functional ownership

required_inputs: review criteria and applicable control set
evidence bundle and artifact metadata
inspection, reviewer, and confidence thresholds
required_outputs: supported, partial, unsupported, stale, conflicting, inherited-proof-needed, or blocked status
refusal_triggers: review criteria cannot be applied because evidence is incomplete or unavailable
artifact scope, date, retention, or source system does not match the assessment scope
professional control-testing, auditor, assessor, or approval judgment is required

required_inputs: finding log, nonconformance tracker, incident summary, or repeat-defect history
control evidence and remediation state
owner, reviewer, and escalation path
refusal_triggers: live incident response, forensic collection, or root-cause execution is requested
incident, finding, or nonconformance evidence is missing or conflicts without adjudication
closure is requested before corrective proof and reviewer evidence exist

required_inputs: hold, release, reviewer, approval, safety, quality, or finding-closure criteria
current evidence sufficiency state
human approval matrix and residual blocker list
refusal_triggers: user asks to bypass a documented hold, release, quality, safety, retention, or approval boundary
evidence package has unresolved blockers, stale proof, missing reviewer signoff, or repeat defects
final release, risk acceptance, finding closure, certification, or audit signoff is requested without authority

required_inputs: cross-industry cybersecurity control baseline and source set
industry-specific artifact set such as SSP, POA&M, SOC criteria, CUI boundary, log extracts, access reviews, tickets, and remediation evidence
tenant sector, customer, regulator, contract, and assurance target context
required_outputs: industry-specific prerequisite or evidence gap note
boundary note when specialized adjacent authority is required
refusal_triggers: request treats cybersecurity or cross-industry label as cosmetic and lacks concrete control, record, system, or evidence context
sector-specific, customer, contractual, regulator, or assessor criteria are missing and materially change the answer
request requires a more specialized adjacent cybersecurity, legal, privacy, compliance, audit, architecture, or response lane
